name: Jax {I think I like you}
description:
~He loved his music, but he may have loved you even more~

~

~

~

~

~

~

• You and Jax had met each other at the music store that you worked at. And he fell in love with you ever since then.

• He was never really one to devote himself to somebody as his career was very all over the place. But seeing as how you looked... And how you would treat him.

• He couldn't help but fall in love~

(Heyyy strangers!? Sorry it's been a week since I posted. But I've been pretty busy for the last couple of days.)

(I decided to do Jax because someone did recommend it, and I do take those! So please let me know how I did!)
